summary: Completed static code review of React Native HabitGen app. All 15 requested features verified via TypeScript compilation and source code analysis. TypeScript compilation passes with no errors. This is a React Native CLI mobile app with no web server - testing done via code review only.
critical_code_review_comments: All 15 features verified implemented correctly in source code
Feature 1: CreateHabitForm.tsx - selectedPreset is number type (single selection) - PASS
Feature 2: DurationScrollWheel.tsx - isSelected logic with bigger (26px) and bolder (800) text - PASS
Feature 3: FocusOverlay.tsx - Modern dark theme (#000), rotating ring, status pill with green dot - PASS
Feature 4: CreateHabitForm.tsx - Difficulty/Priority at opacity 0.45 with lock overlay, opens paywall - PASS
Feature 5: JourneyScreen.tsx - 10 journeys with painPoint field, PRO badge, paywall on tap - PASS
Feature 6: HistoryScreen.tsx - 7-day chart, 'X min' duration format, deduplicated completed sessions only - PASS
Feature 7: types/index.ts + EmojiPicker.tsx - Extended emojis (trading, dancing, content, boxing, horse/bike riding) - PASS
Feature 8: AccountScreen.tsx - No Export Data option, Clear All Data deletes everything - PASS
Feature 9: AuthScreen.tsx - Google OAuth button present with Supabase integration reference - PASS
Feature 10: Bundle ID com.starktechstudio.habitgen in both Android build.gradle and iOS project.pbxproj - PASS
Feature 11: TabNavigator.tsx - Platform-specific Android padding (12px vs 28px iOS) - PASS
Feature 12: TodayScreen.tsx - Fixed header (fixedHeader View), scrollable habits in separate ScrollView - PASS
Feature 13: HistoryScreen.tsx - Fixed header with chart, sessions in separate ScrollView - PASS
Feature 14: TimerScreen.tsx - Start popup explains lock/blocked apps/streak penalty, stop warns streak loss - PASS
Feature 15: TimerScreen.tsx - 30-min break system with 30-second expiry timeout, Alert popup - PASS

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend for this React Native app
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 15 features verified in source code, TypeScript compiles clean

context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a React Native CLI mobile app at /app/HabitGen. No web server runs - testing is via TypeScript compilation (npx tsc --noEmit) and static code review. All 15 features implemented. Mocked APIs: RevenueCat (in-app purchases), Google AdMob, Screen Lock native module.

mocked_integrations.RevenueCat: PremiumScreen.tsx - placeholder for in-app purchase flow
mocked_integrations.Screen Lock: screenlock.ts - uses AppState listener as placeholder, not actual native screen pinning
